name: Sample Script
code:
<script>

// Test Script Snippet (Using CSS Snippet for Styling)
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Create a new div element
    var testDiv = document.createElement('div');

    // Give it the ID that the CSS snippet targets
    testDiv.id = 'cwp-script-test-message';

    // Add text content
    testDiv.textContent = 'CWP Script Snippet Executed Successfully!';

    // Prepend the div to the body
    document.body.prepend(testDiv);

    console.log('CWP Script Snippet test message added to page (styled by CSS snippet).');
});


</script>
